findings.title: CONFIRMED: Command Injection at /login
findings.description:
The cmd parameter is passed to os.system() without sanitization

Verification: CONFIRMED (6/6 vectors confirmed)
Evidence chain: Vector 1 (sep_double_and): CONFIRMED — found '__debugger__' in response; Vector 2 (sep_pipe): CONFIRMED — found '__debugger__' in response; Vector 3 (sep_double_pipe): CONFIRMED — found '__debugger__' in response
